task_completion.description: Identify Helsinki as the capital closest to 25.0E.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map or attribute table shows Helsinki being queried, selected, or focused on.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the city center of Helsinki.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map canvas is zoomed in on the city center of Helsinki.
The 'field_observations' layer is highlighted in the layer panel and/or toggled for editing.

task_completion.description: Create a point feature at the city center.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new point geometry is visible on the map at Helsinki, or the feature creation attribute form is open.
The text 'Ground_Station_25E' is entered into one of the feature's attribute fields in the creation form.

task_completion.description: Include the city name and approximate longitude in the feature description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Helsinki' and an approximate longitude like '24.9' are entered into one of the feature's attribute fields.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GIS graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GIS application interface being used to navigate and edit, rather than just terminal windows or scripts.

integrity.description: The feature was created within the GIS software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The attribute form or map canvas of the GIS software is used to input the data, not a separate text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by directly modifying the database via CLI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of sqlite3 or ogrinfo/ogr2ogr terminal commands being used to directly insert the final feature into the geopackage.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target meridian is 25.0E. The closest capital is Helsinki (approx 24.9E). The target feature name is 'Ground_Station_25E'. Note: The 'field_observations' layer schema actually lacks 'name' and 'description' fields (it contains observer_name, species, location, obs_date, quality_grade). Accept the agent's input if they placed the required name and description text into any of the available text fields.
